caption: Respond to a property possession claim
totalQuestion: What is the total amount you owe for all your priority debts?
contributionQuestion: How much do you pay towards your priority debts each week or month?
amountHint: Enter total amount in pounds and pence, for example £148.00 or £148.50

errors.priorityDebtTotal: Enter the total amount you owe for all your priority debts
errors.priorityDebtTotalMin: The total amount you owe for all your priority debts must be £0.00 or above
errors.priorityDebtTotalMax: The total amount you owe for all your priority debts must be less than £1 billion
errors.priorityDebtContribution: Enter the amount you pay towards your priority debts each week or month
errors.priorityDebtContributionMin: The amount you pay towards your priority debts each week or month must be £0.00 or above
errors.priorityDebtContributionMax: The amount you pay towards your priority debts each week or month must be less than £1 billion
errors.priorityDebtContributionFrequency: Select how frequently you pay the amount you entered above

amount.invalidFormat: Enter an amount in the correct format, for example £148.00 or £148.50
